summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Visual Conversation Flow Builder (Step 4 of Agent Builder) completed. All 15 features tested and working correctly. Flow Builder uses @xyflow/react (ReactFlow) library with custom node types.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for node palette buttons (add-node-messageNode, add-node-questionNode, etc.)
ReactFlowProvider correctly wraps the inner component for proper context
Custom node types registered correctly: startNode, messageNode, questionNode, conditionNode, actionNode, transferNode, endNode
Edge color logic in FlowEdge.tsx correctly maps labels to colors: green for positive paths, red for negative, gray for neutral
Start node correctly marked as deletable: false to prevent deletion
MiniMap nodeColor function correctly maps node types to their respective colors
Default flow buildDefaultFlow() creates 10 nodes and 9 edges as expected
seed_data_creation: Default flow is built programmatically in buildDefaultFlow() function with 10 nodes (Start, Greeting, Qualify Interest, Value Proposition, Polite Decline, Handle Objection, Book Demo, Transfer to Human, End-Demo Booked, End-Not Interested) and 9 edges.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Flow Builder (Step 4) testing complete. To reach Step 4: navigate to /agents/new, fill Step 1 (name, description), click Next, Step 2 click Next, Step 3 fill system prompt, role, add objective, click Next. All flow data is MOCKED via buildDefaultFlow() function.

flow_builder_renders_on_step_4.details: Flow Builder renders correctly on Step 4 (Conversation Flow) of Agent Builder wizard at /agents/new

left_palette_6_node_types.details: Left palette shows 6 node types: Message, Question, Condition, Action, Transfer, End Call with data-testid attributes

default_sales_flow_preloaded.details: Default sales flow pre-loaded with 10 nodes and 9 edges

start_node_green_not_deletable.details: Start node (green) is present and Delete button does NOT appear when selected

message_nodes_purple_with_content.details: Message nodes (purple border) display label and content preview - found 4 MESSAGE labels

question_nodes_blue_3_handles.details: Question nodes (blue border) have 3 source handles: bottom (default), right (yes/green), left (no/red)

condition_nodes_amber_true_false.details: Condition nodes (amber border) have true/false output handles: right (true/green), left (false/red)

action_nodes_cyan_with_badge.details: Action nodes (cyan border) show action type badge - 'calendar_booking' badge visible

transfer_nodes_orange_with_destination.details: Transfer nodes (orange border) show transfer destination - 'To: Support Team' visible

end_nodes_red_terminal.details: End nodes (red border) are terminal with only target handle, no source handles

add_node_buttons_work.details: Clicking 'Add Node' buttons from palette adds nodes to canvas - tested Message, Question, Action nodes

minimap_colored_indicators.details: MiniMap shows colored node indicators matching node types (green=start, red=end, purple=message, etc.)

zoom_controls_present.details: Zoom controls (+, -, fit view) present in bottom-right corner and functional

back_continue_navigation.details: Back button navigates to Step 3 (System Prompt), Continue button navigates to Step 5 (Tools & Functions)

color_coded_edges.details: Edges are color-coded: green for positive paths (Interested, Resolved), red for negative (Not Interested, Escalate), gray for neutral

delete_node_functionality.details: Delete Node button appears when non-start node is selected, successfully deletes the node

mocked_data_note: ALL flow data is MOCKED via buildDefaultFlow() function in ConversationFlowBuilder.tsx. No backend API calls for flow data.
